query:
INSERT INTO subscription_tiers (name, displayName, monthlyPrice, yearlyPrice, postsPerMonth, imagesPerMonth, platformsAllowed, teamMembersAllowed, clientsAllowed, whiteLabelEnabled, analyticsEnabled, prioritySupport, features, isActive)
VALUES 
('basic', 'Basic', 4900, 49000, 100, 100, 2, 1, 1, false, true, false, '["content_calendar", "ai_generation", "csv_import", "basic_analytics"]', true),
('pro', 'Pro', 9900, 99000, NULL, NULL, 10, 5, 1, false, true, true, '["content_calendar", "ai_generation", "csv_import", "advanced_analytics", "ghl_integration", "all_platforms", "scheduling"]', true),
('agency', 'Agency', 29900, 299000, NULL, NULL, 10, 20, 50, true, true, true, '["content_calendar", "ai_generation", "csv_import", "advanced_analytics", "ghl_integration", "all_platforms", "scheduling", "white_label", "client_management", "team_collaboration"]', true)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=name;
